boundary: sdist-to-wheel reproducible build evidence only; does not contact PyPI or TestPyPI, does not validate trusted publishing or provenance signing, and does not claim Terminal-Bench benchmark reproduction

checks.detail: source distribution path points to one .tar.gz file
checks.name: sdist_path

checks.detail: published wheel path points to one .whl file
checks.name: published_wheel_path

checks.detail: source distribution rebuilds to exactly one wheel without build isolation
checks.name: sdist_wheel_rebuild

checks.detail: rebuilt wheel matches the published wheel
checks.name: wheel_filename_match

checks.detail: rebuilt wheel matches the published wheel
checks.name: wheel_sha256_match
